tools.name: Read
tools.description: Read a UTF-8 file from the project workspace.

file_path.description: Path to the file relative to the project root.

tools.name: Write
tools.description: Create or overwrite a UTF-8 file in the project workspace.

file_path.description: Path to the file relative to the project root.

tools.name: Edit
tools.description: Replace exact text in a UTF-8 file within the project workspace.

file_path.description: Path to the file relative to the project root.

tools.name: Bash
tools.description: Run a shell command from the project root and capture stdout and stderr. Provide the raw command only; do not wrap it in timeout or bash -lc because the runtime already does that.

command.description: Raw shell command to execute. Do not prefix it with timeout, sh -c, or bash -lc.

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description: Store a structured todo list snapshot for the current workspace run.

todos.description: Array of todo items to persist.

status.description: Todo status such as pending, in_progress, or completed.

tools.name: AskUserQuestion
tools.description: Capture a concise question that should be surfaced back to the user.

question.description: The question to ask the user.

context.description: Optional short context for why the question matters.

tools.name: Agent
tools.description: Read a project subagent definition and package a delegation request.

agent_name.description: Name of the subagent defined under .pinocchio/agents.

task.description: Work to delegate to that subagent.
